The story, in one motion

The same pieces.
Reorganized into a system.

Watch one artifact system move through five stages: Fragmentation, Integration, Activation, Formation, Multiplication. Nothing is replaced. Everything is reconfigured.

Stage 01

Fragmentation

Everything exists. Nothing connects.
The Forgotten Ways

Where this goes

A system that spreads, adapts, and scales.

Fragmentation → Integration → Activation → Formation → Multiplication. Same artifacts. New behavior. Real movement.
